title: GMS Week 45 - FIRM FINISH!
summary:
Main
Sub-continent markets remain high overall, as they enter the final months of the year and yet, the paucity in the overall supply of vessels indicates that bullish Recyclers have been unable to get their hands on any meaningful tonnage. Cape Rates have come off spectacularly over the past few weeks and as such, there may (finally) be a few Ship Owners who may reconsider scrapping their vessels (in this category) rather than passing further surveys. Tanker chartering rates have also started to stabilize somewhat, and as such, there may not be the deluge of vessels in the coming weeks, in comparison to as many that have been traded in the recent past and specifically from this sector.
